author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--fuzz-ci
content: Plan: Implementing T1-T5 from ADR adversarial review. Order: T4 (permissions) → T5 (Cargo.lock --locked) → T2 (remove continue-on-error) → T3 (increase fuzz durations + nightly job) → T1 (new fuzz targets for comments, labels, updates, milestones, subissues, relations). docs.yml already has permissions block. Will add permissions: contents: read to ci.yml, ci-feature.yml. publish.yml needs contents: read for dry-run and publish jobs. release-builds.yml needs contents: read.
